case_title: FILLMORE APARTMENTS, L.L.C. vs. RIZOVA, STELA AKA STELA RIZANOVA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE APARTMENTS, L.L.C. AS TO DEFENDANT RIZOVA, STELA AKA STELA RIZANOVA DRAGANOVA, ANTOANETA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE APARTMENTS, L.L.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIZOVA, STELA AKA STELA RIZANOVA DRAGANOVA, ANTOANETA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 4/22/97 $2,648.20 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,263.20, LEASE FORFEITED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIZOVA, STELA AKA STELA RIZANOVA DRAGANOVA, ANTOANETA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1425 FILLMORE ST #509, LEASE FORFEITED
